mapper.select:
SELECT c.comment_id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_id, c.reply_to_uid, c.reply_to_name, c.content, c.like_count, c.audit_status, c.audit_reason, c.ai_audit_score, c.status, c.create_by, c.create_time, u.nick_name, u.avatar FROM cw_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id
c.parent_id = 0 AND c.status = '0' AND c.audit_status = '1'
AND c.post_id = #{postId}
ORDER BY c.create_time ASC

SELECT c.comment_id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_id, c.reply_to_uid, c.reply_to_name, c.content, c.like_count, c.audit_status, c.audit_reason, c.ai_audit_score, c.status, c.create_by, c.create_time, u.nick_name, u.avatar FROM cw_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.status = '0' AND c.audit_status = '1' ORDER BY c.create_time ASC

SELECT c.comment_id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_id, c.reply_to_uid, c.reply_to_name, c.content, c.like_count, c.audit_status, c.audit_reason, c.ai_audit_score, c.status, c.create_by, c.create_time, u.nick_name, u.avatar FROM cw_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cw_comment ( post_id, user_id, parent_id, reply_to_id, reply_to_uid, reply_to_name, content, like_count, audit_status, audit_reason, ai_audit_score, status, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{replyToId}, #{replyToUid}, #{replyToName}, #{content}, #{likeCount}, #{auditStatus}, #{auditReason}, #{aiAuditScore}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: UPDATE cw_comment SET status = '1', update_time = sysdate() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE cw_comment SET like_count = like_count + #{delta} WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM cw_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = '0' AND audit_status = '1'
